zh.Burslem, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.Burslem, Stoke-on-Trent district, Staffo: 英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Burslem於1509年出生在英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆時，她的父親Thomas Burslem28歲，母親Joan Rowley20歲。她於大約1530年與Thomas Adams在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1562年3月27日在她的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Burslem于1509年出生在英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆时，她的父亲Thomas Burslem28岁，母亲Joan Rowley20岁。她于大约1530年与Thomas Adams在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1562年3月27日在她的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burslem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Burslem (Staffs), recorded as Burwardeslime in 1252 and Burseleym in 1485.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Burslem was born in 1509, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, her father, Thomas Burslem, was 28 and her mother, Joan Rowley, was 20. She married Thomas Adams about 1530, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 March 1562, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Burslem est née en 1509, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Burslem, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Rowley, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Adams environ 1530, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1562, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Burslem 1509 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Burslem 28 und ihre Mutter Joan Rowley 20. Sie hat um 1530 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Adams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1562 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Burslem è nata il nel 1509 nel Burslem, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Burslem, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joan Rowley, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Adams circa 1530, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1562, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Burslemが1509年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムで生まれた時，父Thomas Burslemは28歳，母Joan Rowleyは20歳であった。約1530年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムでThomas Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1562年3月27日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Burslem(이)가 1509년 영국 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Burslem(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Rowley(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 Thomas Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1562년 3월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Burslem nasceu em 1509, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Burslem, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Rowley, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Adams aproximadamente 1530, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1562, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Burslem родилась в 1509 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Burslem было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Rowley, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Adams около 1530 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 марта 1562 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Burslem nació en 1509, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Burslem, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Rowley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Thomas Adams aproximadamente 1530, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1562, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
